welcome_new:
👋 Welcome to Universal Pharmacy Cashback!

Registration requires a few steps.
enter_address:
📍 Share your location or enter your neighborhood name

Tap the 📍 button to send your exact location or type your neighborhood name.
location_received:
✅ Location received! 🗺️

The courier will call you for delivery details (house, apartment).
password_too_short: ❌ Password must be at least 6 characters. Enter again:
register_success:
✅ Registration successful!

📌 Status: Pending NFC Card Activation

Visit a partner pharmacy to activate your NFC card.
register_duplicate: ❌ You are already registered. Go to main menu.
error_occurred: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
unknown_command: ❌ Unknown command. Use the main menu.
withdraw_amount_prompt:
How much cashback would you like to withdraw?

Current balance: {balance} sum

Enter the amount or press cancel:

✅ Withdrawal request for {amount} sum submitted.
